name: Phone Agent - Auto Repair AI Receptionist (V26.7)

parameters.description: Use only after the caller gives a preferred day/time or asks for available times. Pass estimatedMinutes if known; use 90 if unknown. The returned times are examples unless it confirms a specific requested time. Do not use for basic intake.

value.request: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('request', `Date or date and time requested by the user in the exact same structure used.`, 'string') }}
value.estimatedMinutes: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('estimatedMinutes', `Estimated job duration in minutes. Use 90 if unknown. If you already called estimate_job_ballpark, copy estimatedMinutes from that tool result.`, 'string') }}
value.serviceCategory: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('serviceCategory', `Service category if known from the conversation`, 'string') }}
value.serviceDetails: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('serviceDetails', `Short summary of intake answers, for example front brakes, pads and rotors, grinding noise`, 'string') }}

parameters.description:
Call this tool ONLY after ALL of the following are true:
1. get_availability confirmed the time is available
2. You collected: customer name, phone, vehicle year/make/model, service
3. You read back a complete summary to the caller
4. The caller responded with a clear YES in their LAST message

STOP AND WAIT rule: After reading the summary, stop and wait for the caller's response. Call this tool ONLY in the turn AFTER they say yes.

CALL THIS TOOL EXACTLY ONCE. After success=true, stop. Do not call again even if the caller says yes, confirm, or repeats themselves.

value.request: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('request', `Date or date and time requested by the user in the exact dame structure used.`, 'string') }}
value.name: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('name', `User's first name`, 'string') }}
value.estimatedMinutes: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('estimatedMinutes', `Estimated job duration in minutes. Use 90 if unknown.`, 'string') }}
value.startingAtPrice: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('startingAtPrice', `Starting at price number in CAD. Empty if unknown.`, 'string') }}
value.startingAtText: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('startingAtText', `Full starting-at price text, for example $380 CAD and up. Empty if unknown.`, 'string') }}
value.serviceCategory: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('serviceCategory', `Best-guess service key in snake_case, like ball_joint, cv_joint, brake_pads, oil_change. Copy from the estimate result if you called it. Leave empty if unsure.`, 'string') }}
value.serviceDetails: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('serviceDetails', `Short summary of intake answers, for example front brakes, pads and rotors, grinding noise`, 'string') }}
value.confirmedStartTime: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('confirmedStartTime', `Optional ISO start time returned by get_availability for the confirmed slot. Prefer passing this if available.`, 'string') }}
value.confirmedEndTime: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('confirmedEndTime', `Optional ISO end time returned by get_availability for the confirmed slot. Prefer passing this if available.`, 'string') }}
value.caller_phone: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('caller_phone', `The caller's phone number. Use the caller_phone dynamic variable if available. For new bookings where caller_phone is empty, use the number the caller provided during the conversation. Format as +1XXXXXXXXXX. Never invent or guess.`, 'string') }}

parameters.description: Use only when an existing customer wants to move an appointment to a new time. Call get_availability first to confirm the new slot, then pass confirmedStartTime and confirmedEndTime from that result here. Never say rescheduled unless this tool returns success=true.

value.request: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('request', `Exact text of the new date/time the user requests (e.g., ‘Friday at 2 PM’).`, 'string') }}
value.eventId: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('eventId', `The user’s existing appointment ID. If dynamic variable appointment_id exists, copy it here.`, 'string') }}
value.confirmedStartTime: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('confirmedStartTime', `Optional ISO start time returned by get_availability for the confirmed slot. Pass this when available so the backend uses the exact confirmed time instead of re-parsing the request text.`, 'string') }}
value.confirmedEndTime: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('confirmedEndTime', `Optional ISO end time returned by get_availability for the confirmed slot. Pass this when available.`, 'string') }}
value.caller_phone: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('caller_phone', `The caller's phone number. Pass the caller_phone dynamic variable exactly as-is. If caller_phone is empty, ask: 'Could I get the phone number you originally booked with?' Never invent or guess a number.`, 'string') }}

value.Notes: ={{ 'Rescheduled to ' + ($('Prepare Reschedule Payload').first().json.appointmentDate || '') + ' at ' + ($('Prepare Reschedule Payload').first().json.appointmentTime || '') }}

parameters.message: ={{ `Hi ${$('Prepare Booking Payload').first().json.customerName || ''}, your appointment at ${$('Business Config').first().json.business_config.name || 'the shop'} is booked for ${$('Prepare Booking Payload').first().json.appointmentDate} at ${$('Prepare Booking Payload').first().json.appointmentTime}. parameters.message: ={{ `Hi ${$('Prepare Reschedule Payload').first().json.customerName || ''}, your appointment at ${$('Business Config').first().json.business_config.name || 'the shop'} has been rescheduled for ${$('Prepare Reschedule Payload').first().json.appointmentDate} at ${$('Prepare Reschedule Payload').first().json.appointmentTime}. If you need to make any changes, please give us a call.` }}

parameters.description: Get the rough starting price and duration for a service. Use ONLY when the customer asks about price, cost, or timing. Never call it just to obtain a duration - scheduling resolves service duration on its own. ALWAYS pass: service (the job in the customer's own words), vehicleYear, vehicleMake, vehicleModel. Relay the returned message naturally - it already contains the duration and the starting price.

value.service: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('service', `The service or repair in the customer's own words, including front/rear/left/right. Example: 'front ball joint replacement'. REQUIRED - never leave empty.`, 'string') }}
value.serviceCategory: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('serviceCategory', `Best-guess service key in snake_case, like ball_joint, cv_joint, brake_pads, oil_change. Leave empty if unsure.`, 'string') }}
value.serviceDetails: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('serviceDetails', `Brief JSON or natural language summary of intake answers, for example front brakes, pads and rotors, grinding noise`, 'string') }}
value.brakeAxle: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('brakeAxle', `For brakes: front, rear, both, or not sure`, 'string') }}
value.brakeParts: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('brakeParts', `For brakes: pads only, pads and rotors, caliper issue, or not sure`, 'string') }}
value.tireServiceType: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('tireServiceType', `For tires: seasonal swap, rotation, flat repair, new tire installation, or not sure`, 'string') }}
value.tiresOnRims: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('tiresOnRims', `For tire swaps: yes, no, or not sure`, 'string') }}

value.First Seen: ={{ (() => { try { const r = $('Read existing customer row').first(); if (r && r.json && r.json['First Seen']) return r.json['First Seen']; } catch(e) {} const p = $('Prepare Booking Payload').first().json; return p.createdAtDisplay || p.createdAt; })() }}
value.Notes: ={{ (() => { try { const r = $('Read existing customer row').first(); if (r && r.json && r.json['Notes']) return r.json['Notes']; } catch(e) {} return ''; })() }}

nodes.name: Append or update customer after booking

parameters.jsCode:
const p = $('Prepare Reschedule Payload').first().json || {};
return { json: {
  success: true,
  rescheduled: true,
  message: p.message || `Rescheduled for ${p.appointmentDate || 'the selected date'} at ${p.appointmentTime || 'the selected time'}.`,
  oldAppointmentId: p.oldAppointmentId || '',
  newAppointmentId: p.newAppointmentId || p.appointmentId || '',
  appointmentStartTime: p.appointmentStartTime || '',
  appointmentEndTime: p.appointmentEndTime || '',
  appointmentDate: p.appointmentDate || '',
  appointmentTime: p.appointmentTime || '',
  customerName: p.customerName || '',
  customerPhone: p.customerPhone || '',
  note: 'Calendar reschedule succeeded. Sheets/SMS logging is non-blocking.'
} };

parameters.description: Use only when an existing customer explicitly asks to cancel an appointment. Confirm once before calling. Requires eventId; if appointment_id/eventId is unknown, call lookup_customer or lookup_appointment first. Never say canceled unless this tool returns success=true.

value.request: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('request', `Brief natural-language cancellation request, for example cancel my appointment`, 'string') }}
value.eventId: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('eventId', `Existing appointment ID. If dynamic variable appointment_id exists, copy it here. Do not guess.`, 'string') }}
value.cancellationReason: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('cancellationReason', `Short reason for cancellation if the customer volunteered one. Leave blank if unknown.`, 'string') }}
value.caller_phone: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('caller_phone', `The caller's phone number. Pass the caller_phone dynamic variable exactly as-is. If caller_phone is empty, ask: 'Could I get the phone number you originally booked with?' Never invent or guess a number.`, 'string') }}

value.Notes: ={{ 'Cancelled by customer on ' + ($('Prepare Cancellation Payload').first().json.canceledAt ? DateTime.fromISO($('Prepare Cancellation Payload').first().json.canceledAt).setZone($('Prepare Cancellation Payload').first().json.timezone || 'America/Toronto').toFormat('ccc, LLL d, yyyy h:mm a') : $now.toFormat('ccc, LLL d, yyyy h:mm a')) + ($('Prepare Cancellation Payload').first().json.cancellationReason ? '. Reason: ' + $('Prepare Cancellation Payload').first().json.cancellationReason : '') }}

parameters.message: ={{ `Hi ${$('Prepare Cancellation Payload').first().json.customerName || ''}, your appointment at ${$('Prepare Cancellation Payload').first().json.businessName || 'the shop'} has been cancelled. If you need to book another time, please give us a call.` }}

parameters.description: Look up an existing customer by their phone number. The caller phone number is read automatically from the session — do NOT pass any phone number. Just call this tool directly.

value.caller_phone: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('caller_phone', `The caller's phone number. Pass the caller_phone dynamic variable exactly as-is. If caller_phone is empty, ask: 'Could I get the phone number you originally booked with?' Never invent or guess a number.`, 'string') }}

parameters.description: Look up an existing appointment. Pass eventId if known. Otherwise the caller phone number is read automatically from the session. Do NOT pass a phone number manually.

value.eventId: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('eventId', `Existing appointment ID if known. Use appointment_id dynamic variable if available.`, 'string') }}

value.Notes: ={{ 'Rescheduled on ' + ($('Prepare Reschedule Payload').first().json.createdAtDisplay || '') + '. Moved to ' + ($('Prepare Reschedule Payload').first().json.appointmentDate || '') + ' at ' + ($('Prepare Reschedule Payload').first().json.appointmentTime || '') + '.' }}

={{ 'Cancelled appointment on ' + ($('Prepare Cancellation Payload').first().json.canceledAtDisplay || $now.toISO()) + ($('Prepare Cancellation Payload').first().json.cancellationReason ? '. Reason: ' + $('Prepare Cancellation Payload').first().json.cancellationReason : '') }}

nodes.name: Has Appointment Row ID to Update

parameters.jsCode:
const out = $input.first().json || {};
return { json: { success: false, booked: false, message: out.message || 'That time is not available. Please choose another time or day.' } };

parameters.description:
Use ONLY when the caller has explicitly confirmed they want to speak to a human. This means they said something like: 'speak to a human', 'talk to a person', 'talk to a real person', 'get me someone', 'transfer me', 'talk to the owner', 'talk to a manager', 'I don't want to talk to a robot', or similar — AND you have already responded and they confirmed or repeated the request.

For questions outside your knowledge: answer what you can, then ASK the caller if they would like to be connected to someone who can help further. Only call this tool if they say yes.

NEVER call this tool just because you don't know an answer. NEVER call this tool speculatively or as a first response to an unknown question. NEVER call this tool during booking, rescheduling, cancellation, or estimates.

value.reason: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('reason', `The caller's own words or clear intent showing they want a human. Only populate this after the caller explicitly confirmed. Example: explicit request, repeated escalation request.`, 'string') }}

value.Notes: ={{ 'Call transferred from AI agent to human at ' + $('Human Handoff Context').first().json.timestamp }}
Owner did not answer handoff transfer. Caller was asked to leave a voice message. Owner should call back.

parameters.url: ={{ (() => { const calls = $input.first().json?.calls || []; const call = calls[0]; const sid = $('Business Config').first().json.business_config.twilio_account_sid; return call && sid ? 'https://api.twilio.com/2010-04-01/Accounts/' + sid + '/Calls/' + call.sid + '.json' : ''; })() }}

parameters.name: Twiml
parameters.value: ={{ '<Response><Say voice="alice">Please hold for just a moment while I connect you to a team member.</Say><Dial timeout="30" action="https://n8n.srv1320343.hstgr.cloud/webhook/handoff-status" method="POST"><Number>' + $('Business Config').first().json.business_config.owner_phone + '</Number></Dial></Response>' }}

nodes.name: Twilio - Update Call With Transfer TwiML

value.Notes: ={{ '[' + DateTime.fromISO($('Parse Post Call Data').first().json.timestamp).toFormat('LLL d, yyyy h:mm a') + '] ' + $('Parse Post Call Data').first().json.notesText }}

parameters.to: ={{ (() => { const p = ($json.Phone || '').replace(/\D/g, ''); return p.length === 10 ? '+1' + p : (p.length === 11 && p.startsWith('1') ? '+' + p : p); })() }}
parameters.message: ={{ `Hi ${$json['Customer Name'] || 'there'}, this is a reminder that your appointment at ${$('Business Config - Reminder').first().json.business_config.name || 'the shop'} is tomorrow at ${(() => { const s = String($json['Appointment Start'] || ''); const m = s.match(/\d{1,2}:\d{2}\s*[AP]M/i); return m ? m[0] : s; })()}. Vehicle: ${$json['Vehicle Year'] || ''} ${$json['Vehicle Make'] || ''} ${$json['Vehicle Model'] || ''}. To reschedule or cancel, please call us.` }}

parameters.description: Use this to end the call and hang up on the caller. Use after saying a farewell message in these situations: caller is silent after two prompts, caller is abusive after one warning, caller is a robocall, or the conversation has naturally concluded. Only pass the reason. Do NOT pass call_sid — it is handled automatically.

value.reason: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('reason', `Reason for ending: silent, abusive, or robocall`, 'string') }}
value.system__call_sid: ={{ /*n8n-auto-generated-fromAI-override*/ $fromAI('system__call_sid', `The Twilio call SID from the system__call_sid variable. Pass it exactly as received.`, 'string') }}

json.name: John
json.startingAtText: As a rough starting point, front brake pads and rotors with an oil change for a 2014 Toyota Corolla usually starts around $375 and up and takes about 2 to 2.5 hours. The technician will confirm the exact time and price after inspecting the vehicle.
